_comment: Llama-3.1-8B (32L, hidden 4096, 32 q-heads, 8 kv-heads, hd 128, 8B params) on a single H100-SXM (80GB, 3.35 TB/s HBM3). Single-request / low-concurrency inter-token latency ~11ms reported across vLLM/TensorRT-LLM benchmarks. Source: NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM + vLLM H100 benchmarks (see outputs/validation_vs_hardware.md). APPROXIMATE literature-derived anchor, bf16, short context.
name: llama8b_h100_b1_ctx1k

_comment: Same model/HW, higher concurrency end of the reported single-stream ITL band (~21ms) -> larger effective decode batch. Source as above.
name: llama8b_h100_b32_ctx1k

_comment: Llama-3.1-8B on H100, longer 8k context, single stream. ITL rises modestly with context (more KV to stream). Estimated ~13ms from the same benchmark family. APPROXIMATE.
name: llama8b_h100_b1_ctx8k
